metadata.description: Skills for designing and building DeFi protocols from scratch

plugins.name: defi-protocol-discovery
plugins.description: DeFi protocol opportunity discovery and viability assessment — from raw idea to go/no-go decision, using lean canvas, analogue analysis, economic stress-testing, and assumption mapping.

plugins.name: defi-spec-driven
plugins.description: Six-phase DeFi protocol specification before any Solidity, then per-function implementation tracked against the spec.
